description: A single clause citing itself for every field — the common case where one short clause states who/what/threshold/enforcer together and 'when' genuinely isn't addressed, which P-EXTRACT must say explicitly rather than guess (see ai/prompts/P-EXTRACT.v1.md rule 3).
